text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Requester-led intake. Header (auto identifier immutable, auto date/requester/department, category/direct-indirect/purchaseType/priority/currency/cost-center dropdowns, justification) plus one or more lines (item search-master-or-free-text, code auto, HS code, description, product-used-for,

quantity>0 decimal, UoM, unit price may be 0, available stock, need date, line note, attachments). Free-text item triggers a non-blocking new-item sub-flow that the Procurement Handler approves while the requisition continues. Save draft any time. On submit: mandatory-field gate (field config by

stage/scope/purchaseType, isAuto never gates), total computed and converted to base, soft budget check (warns if over; Budget Owner override is logged, hard commit is later at PO). Routes into the configurable approval chain with per-stage completions, the first stage assigned least-loaded.
